metaDescription: Magpie — Catch your ideas before they fly away.
title: Magpie
tagline: a capture app for wandering minds
intro: Ideas come and go — from podcasts that stop me mid-run, Substacks I never finish, or photos that collect dust in my gallery.
If only a handful of ideas shape what we see, then I needed a simple way to notice what I notice.
Magpie gives me one place to collect text, links, voice notes, and photos that catch my attention - then surfaces the ideas that I keep circling back to.

waitlist.note: Currently in beta. Say hi if you're curious.
